name: No witnesses to my repetitive strain onset. Still claim in Bountiful?

mainEntity.name: No witnesses to my repetitive strain onset. Still claim in Bountiful?

acceptedAnswer.description: Yes, medical evidence and job records suffice for causation under broad Utah coverage.[1] Key factors: (1) AOE/COE presumption; (2) Doctor testimony; (3) Work history.[1] Log duties, get diagnosis; no witnesses not fatal.[1] Focus on proof.
